title: Display calendar week numbers in Timeline
excerpt:
As a media agency we communicate almost entirely, both internally and externally, using calendar week numbers as opposed to actual dates or date ranges. 
Thus we’re missing the display of week numbers specifically in the…

posts.author: svg-si (S.I.)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a media agency we communicate almost entirely, both internally and externally, using calendar week numbers as opposed to actual dates or date ranges.

Thus we’re missing the display of week numbers specifically in the Timeline view but also the Calendar (secondary concern). We think this should be a simple change/addition:

Just being able to toggle in the Timeline the display between Mo-Fr days (ie “10 - 14”) and calendar weeks (ie “CW 09”) via the Timeline View Settings menu would be much appreciated!

We’re baffled that apparently calendar weeks haven’t been requested before according to my searches. Perhaps the use of calendar weeks for scheduling is more typical for companies based in germany compared to the rest of the world?

Please let us know in case this already exists and we somehow missed how to turn it on. Thank you!

posts.author: Adrien361 (Adrien)
posts.cookedHtml:
While this feature may seem trivial at first glance, it would make it possible to group elements in graphical views and compare elements with each other over a period of time, which is currently impossible with periods (the timeline column).

Currently Monday does not allow you to compare items week by week or month by month, if these items contain a timeline column. A handicap for comparing loads and resources over time!

posts.author: JohnBa (John Barry)
posts.cookedHtml: I joined the community specifically because I’d like weeks in the calendar at a minimum. I still need to learn how to “like” something but I will keep my phone calendar next to me until I can only use Monday.com.

posts.author: amber (Amber from monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Adrien361 @JohnBa @svg-si

We’re revamping the timeline column and we want your help!

My name is Amber and I am part of the team responsible for all the columns you see on your monday Boards We’re looking for highly engaged users to shape the future of our timeline column! As a design partner in this journey, you’ll collaborate closely with our product and design teams over the next few weeks and then get early access to the functionality that you helped design!

We’re looking for dedicated users who are excited to provide feedback and work with us to bring this vision to life. If this sounds like you, please fill out this form

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@svg-si @Adrien361 @JohnBa

Hi everyone! If you’re open to apps, our Smart Week Number can help with this. It works with the ISO 8601 standard or your company’s custom fiscal year. It automatically displays the correct week number based on your internal calendar.

You can also choose your preferred week start – Sunday, Monday, or any day that fits your calendar. Plus, with core automation recipes included, it’s easy to tailor things to your team’s workflow.

Regards,
Avo
